props.message:
THE SCOREROOM

A wall of high-scores from the games at the Old Plays. The keeper adds names as they earn them. The realm respects a high score. The realm respects an honest one more.

HIGH SCORES — current and former

  ARCHERY (current):  Velna of Brookhold — 47
  ARCHERY (former):  Olbrin the Postmaster — 39

  TARGET-ROUND (current):  Sef the Runner — 22
  TARGET-ROUND (former):  Marn the Toolwright — 18

  SLINGSHOT (current):  Adra of the Hall — 31
  SLINGSHOT (former):  Belna the Cook — 28

TUX OF THE GLADE — *blank*

root.speaker: Scorekeeper Innis
root.text:
*she has a stub of chalk and a smile.*

Walker! Welcome to the Scoreroom. You play any of the games down at the Old Plays — you come back here, I write you on the wall.

Win one, you go on the current list. Lose your record, you go on the former list. The wall keeps both.

both.speaker: Scorekeeper Innis
both.text:
Because a record beaten is still a record set. The realm doesn't forget who got there first.

Most rooms only keep the new names. We keep all of them. By the Source, that's the kind of room I want to run.

me.speaker: Scorekeeper Innis
me.text:
I will the moment you win one. I've already chalked your line — see? — Tux of the Glade, blank for now. The blank is a promise.

Go win something.

bye.speaker: Scorekeeper Innis
bye.text: Walk well. Come back with a score.
